docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY BALTAZAR PATRICIA F AS TO DEFENDANT CUSCHEIRI PETER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CUSCHEIRI PETER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALTAZAR PATRICIA F RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUSCHEIRI PETER $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $433.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED. ADDRESSEE NOT AVAILABLE.
